description_long: This is a robust, military-style storage box with a dark green, matte finish, constructed primarily from metal. The box features a hinged lid with reinforced edges and two prominent, perforated metal latches on either side for secure closure. A sturdy, side-mounted handle is visible, designed for easy carrying, and the box has angular reinforcements on its sides for added structural integrity. The overall shape is rectangular with a flat top, making it suitable for stacking or placing other objects on top. The design is utilitarian, with no visible labeling or decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. Its size and build suggest it is intended for storing tools, equipment, or ammunition in urban or industrial environments.
description: A dark green, metal storage box with a hinged lid, side handle, and reinforced, utilitarian design. It features perforated latches and a flat, stackable top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid, two perforated latches, and angular side reinforcement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sturdy handle and the profile of the perforated latch mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, with the lid and side reinforcement visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the handle and latch profile from the other side.
